player_visible: The village square is empty beneath a low, clouded sky. An old stone well stands beside a dead pine tree. The village bells have rung at midnight for three nights, though no one admits to pulling the ropes.
sensory_details: cold air rising from the well
current_situation: The player stands beside the old well and may investigate it.
hidden_truths: Fresh rope marks on the inner rim show someone climbed down recently.
A loose stone hides a rusted iron token marked with three vertical lines.
Something below the well listens when people speak near it.

default_checks.trigger: search stones, inspect rim, look for hidden markings, loose blocks, or signs of recent use
default_checks.success: The player finds fresh rope marks and notices one stone is slightly loose.
default_checks.failure: The moss and worn stone make it impossible to tell whether the marks are recent.

default_checks.trigger: listen at the well or try to hear movement below
default_checks.success: The player hears slow, wet breathing from below.
default_checks.failure: The echo of distant bells and the depth of the shaft make it hard to hear anything clearly.

default_checks.trigger: look down, lower a lantern, or peer into the darkness
default_checks.success: The player sees scratches on the inner stones and a section where moss has been rubbed away.
default_checks.failure: The lantern light catches only slick stone and darkness.

scene_clocks.name: Something Below Notices
scene_clocks.description: Noise, calling into the well, or failed checks may increase this clock.
